title: Infinity Arsenal
description:
This Mod adds some weapons i coded
enjoy Great axes,Scythes and longswords

More weapons and enchantments will be added in later updates
body:
## Infinite Arsenal :
infinite arsenal is a tier and progression based weapon mod, it has a veriety of weapons such as **Greataxes**, **Scythes** and **longswords**, Which can be made of diffrent **materials** like **gold**, **iron**, **diamond** and **netherite**





<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


### Great Axes:
**Abilities**: extra reach, high damage, very slow speed
    
**Rebound Enchantment**:
if you attack when falling your fall damage will be translated to knockback and send the target high in the air based on your fall distance

________________________________________________________________________________________________

### Scythes:
**Abilities**: extra reach, high damage, slow speed

**Pullback Enchantment**:
attacking with this enchantment will replace your knockback with your enemy being pulled back towards your direction

________________________________________________________________________________________________

### Longswords
**Abilities**: much extra reach, decent damage, decent speed

**Froststrike Enchantment**:
freazes the attacked enemy on strike


</details>



## Importent Info :
This mod is licensed under **ALL RIGHTS RESERVED** and you are not allowed to make use of its assets such as code or art or port/fork it to other versions or loaders, however you are allowed to place this mod within modpacks, servers, etc, i will not be backporting this mod to older versions and will **not** be **forking/porting** it to **forge**/**neoforge**.

thank you to supertoady for assisting me with gameplay balancing, textures and developing of this mod
